source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A simple pendulum consisting of a mass $m$ and a weightless string of length $l$ is mounted on a support of mass $M$ which is attached to a horizontal spring with force constant $k$ as shown in Fig. 2.51. Find the frequencies for small oscillations.

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A simple pendulum consisting of a mass $m$ and a weightless string of length $l$ is mounted on a support of mass $M$ which is attached to a horizontal spring with force constant $k$ as shown in Fig. 2.51. Find the frequencies for small oscillations.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image representation string, not a concrete file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain:
For small oscillations, $x$, $	heta$, $\dot{x}$, and $\dot{	heta}$ are small quantities. Neglecting terms of orders higher than two, the equations of motion become
\[
 egin{aligned}
(M+m)\,\ddot{x}+ml\,\ddot{	heta}+kx&=0,\
l\,\ddot{	heta}+\ddot{x}+g	heta&=0.
\end{aligned}
\]
Set
\[
x=A\exp(i\omega t),\quad 	heta=B\exp(i\omega t).
\]
These equations become
\[
 egin{pmatrix}
k-(M+m)\omega^{2} & -ml\omega^{2}\
-\omega^{2} & g-l\omega^{2}
\end{pmatrix}
 egin{pmatrix} A\ B \end{pmatrix}=0.
\]
The secular equation
\[
\left| egin{array}{cc}
k-(M+m)\omega^{2} & -ml\omega^{2}\
-\omega^{2} & g-l\omega^{2}
\end{array}ight|=Ml\omega^{2}-[g(M+m)+kl]\omega^{2}+gk=0
\]
has two positive roots
\[
 egin{array}{l}
\omega_{1}=\left[ rac{g(M+m)+kl+\sqrt{[g(M+m)+kl]^{2}-4Mlgk}}{2Ml}ight]^{1/2}, \
\omega_{2}=\left[ rac{g(M+m)+kl-\sqrt{[g(M+m)+kl]^{2}-4Mlgk}}{2Ml}ight]^{1/2},
\end{array}
\]
which are the normal-mode angular frequencies of the system.

(M+m)\,\ddot{x}+ml\,\ddot{	heta}+kx&=0,\
l\,\ddot{	heta}+\ddot{x}+g	heta&=0.
\end{aligned}
\]

\[
x=A\exp(i\omega t),\quad 	heta=B\exp(i\omega t).
\]

\[
 egin{pmatrix}
k-(M+m)\omega^{2} & -ml\omega^{2}\
-\omega^{2} & g-l\omega^{2}
\end{pmatrix}
 egin{pmatrix} A\ B \end{pmatrix}=0.

The secular equation
\[
\left| egin{array}{cc}
k-(M+m)\omega^{2} & -ml\omega^{2}\
-\omega^{2} & g-l\omega^{2}
\end{array}ight|=Ml\omega^{2}-[g(M+m)+kl]\omega^{2}+gk=0

\[
 egin{array}{l}
\omega_{1}=\left[ rac{g(M+m)+kl+\sqrt{[g(M+m)+kl]^{2}-4Mlgk}}{2Ml}ight]^{1/2}, \
\omega_{2}=\left[ rac{g(M+m)+kl-\sqrt{[g(M+m)+kl]^{2}-4Mlgk}}{2Ml}ight]^{1/2},
